div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
1. Requests one authenticated
cursor page over HTTP

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
2. Reads through the
query-only export core
without audit writes

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
3. Runs standalone export
without daemon readiness or
token bootstrap

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
5. Emits the same
schema-versioned body-safe
page on stdout

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Sole local operator who
browses with Windows Chrome
and searches, reviews, and
deletes local browser-memory
records.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
A downstream local
integration that reads
versioned body-safe
observation pages without
gaining capture, migration,
or mutation authority.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.div:
Authenticated loopback API
for capture, read/admin/media
operations, and query-only
bmd.x-observations v1 export.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Command-line interface for
serving/admin operations,
direct storage/health
workflows, and standalone
mutation-free X observation
export.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.div:
Durable text/metadata
authority including migration
ledger, capture observations,
and immutable observation
ingest sequences.
